Name: PhoneDeck
Tagline: Turn your iPhone into a free Mac controller
Description: You already own a StreamDeck. It's your iPhone. PhoneDeck turns your iPhone into a fully customizable Mac controller, media controls, app launcher, custom buttons, all on your phone's screen. No hardware. No subscription. Free. Built by a solo developer in 7 days because I needed it myself. Works out of the box. No setup headaches. Download Now: Phonedeck.io

Name: Vida
Tagline: Clone yourself. Let AI do the work before you ask
Description: Vida is an AI that learns how you work, remembers what matters, and becomes more like you over time. The more you use Vida, the more it understands your habits, your projects, and your way of getting things done. Eventually, it works like a second version of you—quietly handling repetitive work in the background before you even ask. Today, we’re launching our first 5 SOTA use cases: Reply Rescue · Prompt Rescue · Resume Rescue · Workspace Cleanup · Daily Wrap 95 more to conquer in public.

Name: CentryAI
Tagline: Subscription tracker built by someone who forgot 11 of them
Description: I built CentryAI because I have ADHD and was paying for 11 subscriptions I hadn't used in months. Most trackers make you enter everything manually — that doesn't work if you've forgotten what you're paying for. CentryAI scans your Gmail or iCloud, finds every recurring charge, and scores which ones you're not using. The real pain is cancelling. CentryAI's Cancel Finder locates the exact cancellation page in one tap. No bank linking. Emails are never stored. Available in 18 languages.

Name: ChecklistFox
Tagline: AI Checklist Maker - Beautiful PDFs, Free & Instant
Description: Type a prompt, get a beautiful planner. Choose a theme that feels like you, then download as a PDF. Built for weddings, hajj, new babies, big moves, and everything in between.

Name: Mentic
Tagline: Autonomous AI agent that runs your Meta ads end-to-end
Description: Mentic is an autonomous AI agent that runs your Meta ads end-to-end. Around 20 specialized agents handle research, targeting, optimization, and reporting, and coordinate with each other so you only ever talk to one. Manage it from Slack, Telegram or the dashboard if you prefer. Campaigns run on your own ad account, so you keep your pixel, audiences, and data. Flat subscription, no % of ad spend. Built by an ex-agency founder to replace them.

Name: Termi Protocol
Tagline: Watch your AI coding agents build, live in 3D
Description: The Termi Protocol is a 3D simulation of AI agent workflows. Give your coding agents a face, a desk and a living room. Watch them read, write and run commands live in 3D, like a game. You run the agents; we visualize the process.

Name: Qik Office
Tagline: AI Office that deploys AI managers across agentic rooms
Description: Build your first AI Office that deploys unlimited AI project managers and AI assistants. These agents work with humans in shared environments called Agentic Rooms and help to write AI minutes, execute commands, do research, schedule meetings, auto-assign tasks, set reminders, plan new projects & execute specific assigned tasks. AI Office delivers 2x productivity for individuals, small teams, startups and enterprises. It is completely free with extra agent credits for product hunters.

Name: ShotLab
Tagline: Turn boring screenshots into scroll-stopping content!
Description: Add beautiful backgrounds, realistic frames, stickers, annotations, and more to your screenshots with an easy to use editor. Create eye-catching visuals that grab attention, boost engagement, and make your posts, products, and content stand out instantly.

Name: digitvest.com
Tagline: Starter SaaS websites built for founders
Description: Digitvest is a curated sales page for ready-made SaaS websites, web apps, and AI-powered digital assets. Each project is built, packaged, and prepared for transfer, so founders, indie hackers, and operators can skip the early setup phase and start with an existing product foundation. The focus is on simple, usable starter projects that can be improved, marketed, monetized, or used as a base for a new business.

Name: Real-Time Analytics Pipeline
Tagline: Real-time analytics: FastAPI, Kafka, TimescaleDB
Description: Enterprise open-source real-time analytics pipeline: 10K+ events/sec, sub-50ms latency. FastAPI async API, TimescaleDB time-series, Kafka streaming, Redis caching, WebSocket live, Prometheus/Grafana monitoring, OpenTelemetry tracing. Anomaly detection, K8s auto-scaling, 150+ tests. Ideal for IoT, fintech, observability.

Name: GraviSync
Tagline: Control your Antigravity IDE from anywhere
Topics: Productivity, Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub
Description: GraviSync lets you securely connect to your Antigravity IDE agent from any device. Scan a QR code to monitor progress, approve actions, send prompts, attach screenshots, and reference project files—all from your phone. Whether you're away from your desk or simply want to keep an eye on long-running tasks, GraviSync keeps you connected without interrupting your workflow.

Name: Pic-Asso
Tagline: Hide objects in images. Challenge others to find them.
Description: Pic-Asso is a social hide-and-seek game played inside images. Players hide a silhouette in a photo, then others try to find it before time runs out. You can create clever hides, challenge random players, collect likes, climb leaderboards, unlock galleries, and play quick live matches. It mixes puzzle solving, creativity, and competition in short mobile sessions.

Name: List Detective: Free Email List Checker
Tagline: Find out what's wrong with your email list. 100% Free.
Description: Uncover hidden problems in your email list — instantly and for free. Up to 100,000 addresses — runs entirely in your browser, nothing is sent to a server. Built for email marketers who care about deliverability and sender reputation. Try now with the sample data available on the site.

Name: stockpixtagger.com
Tagline: Video and photo tagger. Title,description, keywords, hashtag
Description: PixTagger writes buyer-focused titles, two-sentence descriptions, and marketplace-ready keywords for your stock photos and videos. It maps keywords to Getty's official controlled vocabulary so submissions pass validation, orders Adobe keywords by search weight, analyzes video across three frames for motion keywords, and exports import-ready CSVs (Adobe, Getty ESP, qHero). Free to try — 15 credits, no subscription. Category: AI / Photography / Productivity

Name: NeuroForge
Tagline: One AI OS, six specialized agents for every workflow
Description: NeuroForge AI is a multi-agent AI OS for real engineering & knowledge work. Six agents: Engineer AI (LangGraph Planner→Coder→Tester→Debugger), Research AI, Education AI, Automation AI, Conversational AI, plus an Admin/RAG Studio with org-level knowledge isolation (ChromaDB + Gemini embeddings). Built with FastAPI, LangChain, LangGraph, MongoDB, Groq, Docker. One unified OS instead of five separate tools. Built solo — would love feedback on agent orchestration & RAG design!

Name: LimitBar
Tagline: macOS menu bar app showing your Claude usage limits
Description: If you're powerusing Claude Code (esp. with Fable), the usage limits are your work budget. LimitBar keeps all of them in your Mac menu bar, updated every 60s, so you can plan your day instead of re-running /usage or clicking the usage wheel all the time. Native Swift, under 1 MB, no Electron. Reads the same numbers Claude shows you and spends zero tokens doing it. Unofficial, not an Anthropic product. €2.99, source included.

Name: ClaimCaliber
Tagline: Sharper calls. Cleaner claims.
Description: Practice real medical-claim decisions on realistic, made-up claims. Make the call, then get a veteran examiner's breakdown of the right answer, the trap, and the fix. For claims examiners, coders, and billers. Free to try.

Name: One Ping Assitant
Tagline: Get things done in one ping(text).
Description: Schedule reminders, manage tasks, and set up Google Meet events instantly with a simple WhatsApp message. No apps or downloads, just pure productivity.

Name: PopMyVideo
Tagline: Auto Captions, Texts & Effects
Topics: Android, Photography, Photo & Video, Video Art
Description: You shoot, AI automatically adds captions, graphics, sound, music to make it studio quality. It works with any type of long form or short form video from podcasts to stock video clips. It is optimized for viewer retention so each effect you see is meant to hook your audience. Zero editing for podcasts, ads, trailers, music videos and more.

Name: Solitaire.Free
Tagline: Play Klondike, FreeCell & Spider Solitaire Online
Description: Play free online solitaire on Solitaire.Free — Klondike, FreeCell and Spider, no signup and no download. Solver-verified winnable deals, Vegas scoring, and a personal win-rate dashboard that works even when you are not logged in.
